name: Prompting-MammAlps: Fine-Grained Text-to-Video Retrieval for Camera-Trap Data
summary: arXiv:2607.09876v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatically retrieving videos from large camera-trap datasets remains challenging. Text-to-Video retrieval (TVR) methods based on large video-lan...
description: arXiv:2607.09876v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatically retrieving videos from large camera-trap datasets remains challenging. Text-to-Video retrieval (TVR) methods based on large video-language models (VLMs) have potential to retrieve events of interest by describing them with simple text queries. However, current methods often lack spatiotemporal understanding and do not generalize we...
author: Valentin Gabeff, Baptiste Maquignaz, Jennifer Shan, Sepideh Mamooler, Gencer Sumbul, Blair Costelloe, Devis Tuia, Alexander Mathis
